privileged_info_summary: The agent must generate HAR files tracking network performance for the official Tor Project check site (check.torproject.org) and DuckDuckGo's official v3 onion service (duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion). The target domains and output paths (/home/ga/Documents/OnionProfiling/check_clearnet.har and /home/ga/Documents/OnionProfiling/ddg_onion.har) exactly match the evaluation scripts (setup_task.sh, verifier.py, export_result.sh). The task accesses live public services rather than synthetically generated network data.
